title: Rye Toast with Toasted Ukrainian Bread
description: A simple Ukrainian-inspired snack made with toasted rye bread and served with rapidly toasted bread.
instructions: Cut the Ukrainian bread into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes.
Place the bread cubes on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Meanwhile, cut the rye bread into 1-inch (2.5 cm) slices.
Butter one side of each rye bread slice.
Place the bread slices on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Remove the bread from the oven and let cool for a minute.
Top each rye bread slice with a spoonful of toasted Ukrainian bread cubes.
Serve immediately, with sour cream or cheese on the side if desired.
